upload.label: Upload font
upload.placeholder: Drop font here or click to upload

color.heading: Color
color.usesFormats: This font uses {formats} for color glyphs.
color.noColorGlyphs: This font has no color glyphs.
color.noPaletteDescription: Colors are hardcoded directly in the font's glyphs (no palette to customize).

summary.hasFeatures: has {count, plural, one {# OpenType feature} other {# OpenType features}}
summary.supportsLanguages: supports {count, plural, one {# language} other {# languages}}

details.heading: Font details
details.featuresDetectedWithCount: OpenType features were detected in the font ({count})
details.noFeatureTags: This font has no GSUB/GPOS feature tags exposed by the layout tables.

rawTables.heading: Raw tables
rawTables.summary: {tableCount} tables · {totalBytes} bytes total. Expand a table to inspect its decoded fields.
rawTables.noFields: No decoded fields for this table.
rawTables.empty: No raw tables found in this font.

sidebar.placeholderNotice: Example font — upload yours to inspect it.

localFontPicker.label: Or pick a local font
localFontPicker.descriptionAvailable: Pick a font already installed on your system (Chrome/Edge only).
localFontPicker.descriptionBlocked: Local font access is blocked. Use “How to enable” below, then reload this page.
localFontPicker.disabledMessage: Local font access is blocked in your browser settings.

helpDialog.title: Enable local font access
helpDialog.subtitle: The browser won't ask again after you block access.
helpDialog.blockedExplanation: If you chose Block when the browser asked for local font access, it will not show that prompt again. Turn the permission back on in your browser's site settings, then reload this page.
helpDialog.step1: Click the lock or tune icon to the left of the address bar on this site.
helpDialog.step3: Find Local fonts and set it to Allow.
helpDialog.step4: Reload this page, then search installed fonts again.
helpDialog.fromBrowserSettingsBody: Open {settingsPath}, find this site in the list, and set Local fonts to Allow. Reload afterward.
helpDialog.chromiumOnlyNote: Local font picking only works in Chromium browsers ({browser} / Edge). You can always upload a font file instead.

subsetting.heading: Subsetting
subsetting.description: Paste the actual text your site uses (a page's content, not a sample sentence) to see how much of this font you really need, and get a ready command to cut the rest.
subsetting.emptyNotice: Nothing pasted yet — the stats below reflect an empty selection.
subsetting.estimateNote: This is a rough estimate — actual file size savings also depend on each glyph's outline complexity, hinting, and any layout tables (kerning, ligatures) pyftsubset keeps for the glyphs it retains.
subsetting.unsupportedTitle: Some characters aren't in this font
subsetting.unsupportedDescription: This font has no glyph for: {chars}. Those characters will render with a fallback font regardless of subsetting.
subsetting.commandNote: Requires fonttools (pip install fonttools brotli) to run locally.

stylesheet.heading: CSS
stylesheet.description: A ready-to-use stylesheet for this font — @font-face, a toggleable class per OpenType layout feature, and a class per variable-font instance. Classes use CSS custom properties so you can combine several at once without them overriding each other.
stylesheet.namespaceDescription: Prefix for every generated class and custom property, so multiple fonts' CSS don't collide.
stylesheet.useNativeAxisDescription: Map wght/wdth to font-weight/font-stretch instead of raw font-variation-settings.
stylesheet.fontFeatureSettingsOnlyDescription: Skip font-variant-* properties (e.g. small-caps) and always use font-feature-settings.
stylesheet.includeColorPalettesDescription: Adds @font-palette-values and a toggle class for each extra CPAL color palette.

summaryPanel.accuracyDiscrepancy: {count} {count, plural, one {Southeast Asian language} other {Southeast Asian languages}} look supported by cmap alone but fail mark positioning under shaping-verified checking.
summaryPanel.decomposedNote: * supported via combining marks, not a precomposed glyph
summaryPanel.noLanguageSystems: No language-specific GSUB/GPOS layout tables detected.
summaryPanel.languageSystemsDeclared: This font's GSUB/GPOS layout tables declare explicit support for:
summaryPanel.positioningIssuesNote: Glyphs exist but GPOS does not position combining marks correctly.

layoutFeatures.empty: This font doesn't define any OpenType layout features.
layoutFeatures.requiredDescription: These are always applied by the text-shaping engine — you can't turn them off, and aren't meant to.
layoutFeatures.optionalDescription: Some are on by default and can be turned off; others are off by default and can be turned on.

tester.heading: Tester
tester.languageDescription: Layers icon = this font's GSUB/GPOS layout tables declare explicit support for that language.
tester.instanceDescription: This font has {count, plural, one {# preconfigured instance} other {# preconfigured instances}}.
tester.autoOpticalSizingDescription: Let the browser pick the optical-size axis value from the rendered font size, instead of the slider below.

main.loadToInspectRawTables: Load a font to inspect its raw tables.
main.loadToInspectColor: Load a font to inspect its color glyphs.
main.loadToTest: Load a font to test it.
main.loadToInspectLayoutFeatures: Load a font to inspect its layout features.
main.loadToGenerateStylesheet: Load a font to generate its stylesheet.
main.loadToSeeSubsetting: Load a font to see subsetting recommendations.
main.captionAll: Showing every character this font maps. Hover a cell for its Unicode code point.
main.captionLimited: Showing the first {max} of {total} characters. Hover a cell for its Unicode code point.
main.urlLoadError: Could not load font from that URL — the source may block cross-origin requests. Try downloading the file and dropping it here instead.
